titleStmt.title: SII 9.479: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 479. (A.R. No. 410 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE OUTER PRAKARA OF THE MAHALINGESVARA TEMPLE AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1433, Śukla, Māgha, śu. 5 corresponding to A.D. 1510 January 14 Monday (not verifiable), in the reign of Bhujabala-Narasiṁga-Mahārāya ruling from Vijayanagarī. It records that, under the orders of the king, Mallapa-Nāyaka, younger brother of Sōvaṇa-Nāyaka of Kuṟugōḍ, who was ruling over Bārakūru-rājya collected kāṇike from the merchants of Paḍuvakēri in Basarūr for offerings and other services of the god Mahādēva and himself made a grant of the village Paḍuva-Belatūr in Hāru-nāḍu and Mūḍa-Belatūr. It also records that on Tuesday, ba. 8 of Chaitra, Ī'svara, Saṅkamma-Modaliti, daughter of the grand-daughter of Bemmaṇa-Bhaṇḍāri, made a gift of 60 varāhas and an yearly grant of a fixed quantity of rice for the service of the same god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipataEṁ namaḥ nirvighnamastu . namastuṁgaśiraccuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē tra
yilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśaka
varṣa 1432 saṁdu mūṟaneya vartamānada śuklasaṁvatsarada māgha śudha 5 lū śrīmanmahārājādhirā
ja paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrabhujabala narasiṁgamahārāyarū vijayanagariya siṁhāsanadalū su
khasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁda sakalasāṁbrājyavanu pratipālisuva kāladalū Avara nirūpadiṁda kuṟugōḍa sōvaṇa
nāyakara taṁma mallapanāyakarū bārakūra rājyavanu Āḷuvali basaṟūra paḍuvakēryya śrīmahādēvarige
dhar(ṁ)makke Amrutapaḍi naṁdādīvige Aṁgaraṁgavayibhōga naḍavahāge mallapavoḍeyarū paḍuvakēriya halaru seṭi
kāṟara kayyalū hoṁnanu kāṇikeya māḍisikoṁḍu Ā mahādēvarige paṁcāmruta muṁtāgiha
dharmake biṭṭa Ūru hāṟunāḍa voḷage paḍuva belatūra catussīme vivara Avaḷāḍiya gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu ye
tida Agaḷiṁda baḍagalu heṁmāḍiya gaḍiṁ paḍuvalu hoḷeyiṁ teṁkalu kuduru sahavāgi mūḍabelatūra
catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu tūkanāḍiya gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu yettida Agaḷiṁda baḍagalu Avaḷāḍiya gaḍi
yiṁ mūḍalu hoḷeyiṁ baḍagalu �yo nāluku catussīmevoḷage yī yeraḍu Ūralu Aramanege saluva kuḷa pramāṇada ho
nnu Alliya Asādhya pārupatya nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāśāṇa Aṣṭabhōga sahavāgi Ācaṁdrārkavāgi bāḷuvaṁtāgi dhārāpū
rvakavāgi bāḷi yeṁdu barasi koṭṭa śilāśāśana mallappanāyakara vopa bārakūra karaṇika nāyapagaḷa maga mala
rasara baraha hāṟunāḍu samastara vopa belatūra jaṁnigaḷa vopa . svadattaṁ vā paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasu
ṁdhara ṣaṣṭhivaruśasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāśrēyōnrupālanātu dānātu
svargamavāpnōti pālanādacutaṁ padaṁ . yīśvarasaṁvatsarada cayitra ba 8 maṁ lū basaṟūra paḍuvakē
riya mahādēvarige koṁgabaḷiya toḷahara baḷiya Aṁṇubhaṁḍāri beṁmaṇabhaṁḍāriya
moṁmagaḷa magaḷu saṁkaṁmamodaliti mahādēvara ceṁbina kelasakke koṭṭa doḍa varaha ga 60 A va
rahage baḍi varuṣaṁpratiyalu belatūra hoṁnina voḷage varaha ga 4 . ge nāghaṁḍugada Amā 11 . 0
Akiyanū mahādēvarige mosara Upārakke Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi naḍavaṁtāgi saṁkamamodaliti māḍidaThe inscription stops here abruptly.
Digital edition of SII 9.479 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
